name: io.github.sebastienrousseau/rlg-mcp
description: MCP server exposing rlg (RustLogs) log streams to LLM agents. Tools: tail_log, filter_log, summarize_errors. Speaks JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdio. Ideal for on-call SRE workflows where Claude Desktop, Cursor, or mcp.run needs to reason about live application logs.
